commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `--allow-build=openclaw` to pnpm global install arguments for GitHub/git OpenClaw source specs and extends update-global argv tests.

Reproducibility: no. not from this review: I did not run a real pnpm global git install in the read-only checkout. The current-main command construction is source-reproducible, and pnpm help confirms the relevant build-allowlist option.
